title: S.O. No. 651(E) dated 10.07.2000 - Reconstitution of Animal Welfare Board of India
description: S.O. No. 651(E) dated 10.07.2000 - Reconstitution of Animal Welfare Board of India
text: REGD NO D L -33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 457] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, JULY 10,2000/ASADHA 19,1922 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC 3 (i)] MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th July, 2000 S.O. 651(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 5A of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby notifies the names of the following Members of Parliament (Lok Sabha) as the Members on the Animal Welfare Board of India in place of (1) Shri Giridhar Gamang (2) Shri Adityanath (3) Shri Prasanna Acharya and (4) Prof. Saiffudin Soz, who were ceased to be Members on this Board on the dissolution of the 13th Lok Sabha on 27th April, 1999, and for that purpose makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 495(E), dated the 9th June, 1998, namely :— In the said notification, for serial numbers (25) to (28) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— Printed by the Manager. Govt of India Press, Ring Road. Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 [No. 1/15/97-AW] DHARMENDRA DEO, Jt. Secy. Note : The notification reconstituting the Animal Welfare Board of India was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 495(E), dated the 9th June, 1998 and subsequently amended vide number S.O. 788(E), dated the 7th September, 1998, S.O. 934(E), dated 29th October, 1998 and S.O. 1159(E), dated the 16th November, 1999. (25) (26) (27) (28) Shri Prasanna Acharya 121, V.P. House, New Delhi-110001 Shri Yogi Aditya Nath 123-125, North Avenue, New Delhi-110001 Smt. Preneet Kaur 123, Jor Bagh, New Delhi-110003 Dr. Ram Lakhan Singh 184, South Avenue, New Delhi-110011. Member elected under section 5(l)(i) Member elected under section 5(l)(i) Member elected under section 5(l)(i) Member elected under section 5(l)(i)" -- 2 of 2 --
